import fitz, sys

    'opa325.pdf',
    'tlv1701.pdf',
    'sn74hc00.pdf',
    'sn54hc32.pdf',
    'sn74hc14.pdf',
    'sn74lv6t17.pdf',
    'BCP56T1-D.pdf',
]
base = r'C:\\Users\\BachNguyen\\Downloads\\latchup_design\\latchup_v4.0\\prototype_commercial_parts'

")

    print\(doc[i].get_text\(\)\)
